title: North Korean Music Disc Pack
description: Replaces the droppable music discs with songs from the Democratic People's Republic of Korea.
body:
This resource pack is the perfect music kit for any proud potato farmer! Listen to your favorite songs from the DPRK. 

Current DPRK Music Map:


```
mellohi - Are We Living Like in Those Days (Pochonbo)
strad - Night Lights On the Train Which Travels Kim Jong-Il (Pochonbo)
cat - We Are Masters of the Farm (Pochonbo)
far - I Presented Red Flowers (Pochonbo)
mall - Train of Reunification Runs (Pochonbo)
chirp - We Will Safeguard the Leadership of the Revolution with Desperate Courage
blocks - Don't Ask My Name (Pochonbo)
13 - Ten Million Will Become Bullets and Bombs
11 - One Against A Hundred
ward - The Party Is The Generals Embrace (Pochonbo)
stal - Korea Does What It Is Determined to Do
wait - We Will Follow You Only
```
